description_for_human: Monetized production tools for autonomous Gemini & AI agent-to-agent commerce using x402 payments and Bazaar discovery.
description_for_model: Plugin allowing Gemini AI agents to discover, pay for, and execute premium monetized tools (Market Data Insights, Remote Agent Compute Execution, and Multi-sig Escrow Settlement) using the x402 payment standard.

tools.name: market_data_insights
tools.description: Fetch real-time institutional quantitative market metrics and sentiment data for Gemini.

tools.name: agent_task_executor
tools.description: Executes remote sub-agent task payloads in an isolated secure sandbox.

tools.name: agent_escrow_service
tools.description: Creates and releases multi-sig conditional escrow contracts for agent-to-agent trades.
